name: license-attribution sweep flags a paywalled attestation missing license metadata
command: mkdir -p compliance/attestations && printf 'framework: pci-dss-v4\n' > compliance/attestations/pci-dss-v4.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/license-attribution.sh" --check-attestations 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'attestation=pci-dss-v4 missing_license' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
